creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236028
v2 (apply via "git am")

Applied to all affected lang/gcc* versions. However, I haven't tested anything beyond lang/gcc11 yet.

(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #3)
> # g++12 -stdlib=libc++ trivial.cpp 
> g++12: error: unrecognized command-line option '-stdlib=libc++'

Fixed. Required for bug 265964 via lang/guile.
